data.body: Resumed epic adept-hedge-stain. Worktree ff-merged to current origin/main (e72e23fab). venv local build confirmed. Started 9622 (reconciler safety wiring). Resolved the 4 round-3 design blockers from code facts; refined ACs over 3 review-plan rounds; round-3 review-plan PASSED + signed. Triaging 19 advisories: two material factual errors found (add_label routes through subprocess NOT acli_rest so does not raise HTTPError; create dedup guard confused since create subprocess errors never retry at _call_with_retry). Launched transport-mapping subagent to nail which _call_with_retry-wrapped writes actually raise HTTPError before finalizing plan + implementing.
